# equally-weighted pools so the player can browse/choose between them
# in the Equipment Designer's icon picker.

			icons = { GFX_STH_helmet_equipment_m45_prototype_02 }
		}

			weight = 1

		pool = {

		pool = {

			icons = { GFX_STH_helmet_equipment_m45_prototype_10 }
		}
	}

	STH_helmet_equipment_volkssturm = {
		pool = {
			weight = 1
			icons = { GFX_STH_helmet_equipment_volkssturm_01 }
		}
		pool = {
			weight = 1
